00:19:10	Maaike van Vliet:	Bas, I also mentioned the NS example in a keynote presentation and of course the Dutch people asked:

’Well we’ve never seen the library example in real life in the trains, so if it works so well, why hasn’t it been implemented then?’’. 

Do you know why that is or where I can find the original research on this case?
00:29:45	Dr. Ahmad Misto:	READ DR. DANIEL KAHNEMAN'S BOOK "THINKING, FAST AND SLOW

00:57:41	Paul Craven:	It actually makes huge evolutionary sense to be easily distracted - millions of years of hardwiring helping animals to be aware of danger. The ping of a text message has the same effect on the brain.
